allow:
Bash(git add src-tauri/tauri.conf.json && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix DMG bundling by using explicit bundle targets

Change bundle targets from "all" to ["app", "dmg"] to fix
bundle_dmg.sh failing with incorrect arguments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add README.md src-tauri/Cargo.toml src-tauri/src/lib.rs && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add tray icon left-click toggle and update README

- Enable macOS private API for tray icon template support
- Add left-click handler to toggle window visibility from tray
- Use icon_as_template for proper macOS menu bar appearance
- Add usage instructions and troubleshooting to README

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add build convenience scripts and Claude local settings

- Add tauri:release script to copy .app to Desktop
- Add tauri:install script to install to /Applications
- Update README build instructions with new scripts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add .claude/settings.local.json src-tauri/src/lib.rs src-tauri/icons/tray-icon.png src-tauri/icons/tray-icon@2x.png && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add custom tray icon with @2x Retina support

- Add dedicated tray-icon.png and tray-icon@2x.png
- Load tray icon from embedded bytes instead of app icon
- Disable icon_as_template for color tray icon display

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)
